description:
Description

The Nike Dri-FIT Cushion No Show Sock 6-Pack features a supportive fit with arch compression. Dri-FIT fabric pulls away sweat to help keep you cool and comfortable. Ventilated mesh for lightweight breathability. Left/right specific design for a better fit. 39% cotton/32% nylon/27% polyester/2% spandex. Imported.
features: dri fit socks no show women 6 pack
Arch compression provides a snug fit
Reinforced heel and toe add durability.
parentTitle: Nike Women's Performance Dri Fit Performance No Show Cotton Cushioned Moisture Wicking Socks
title: Nike Women's Performance Dri Fit Performance No Show Cotton Cushioned Moisture Wicking Socks White Medium (6-10) US Women (6 Pack)
